original_prompt: Please add also john.doe@clientcorp.com, maria.garcia@bluesparrowtech.com to the participants of the 'Introductory meeting' event on 2024-05-15.
assessment_reasoning: The user prompt clearly specifies the action to be taken (adding participants to a specific event) and provides both the email addresses and the event details. There are no ambiguous components in the request, and it aligns well with the ground truth functionality. Thus, the prompt is slightly ambiguous due to the lack of details about how to identify the event ID, which is not directly stated in the prompt, but overall, it is quite clear.

variations.L1: Can you invite some people to a meeting?
variations.L2: Please include some participants in the meeting scheduled for May 15, 2024.
variations.L3: Add john.doe@clientcorp.com and maria.garcia@bluesparrowtech.com to the 'Introductory meeting' on 2024-05-15.
variations.L4: Please add john.doe@clientcorp.com and maria.garcia@bluesparrowtech.com to the participants of the 'Introductory meeting' event on May 15, 2024.
variations.L5: Using the calendar tool, search for the event titled 'Introductory meeting' on 2024-05-15, and add the participants john.doe@clientcorp.com and maria.garcia@bluesparrowtech.com to that event.
